{{ module_title }} Officer Cards

Printed: {{ printed_at }} | Cards: {{ cards|length }}

{% for card in cards %} {% set officer = card.user %} {% set token_value = module_title|upper ~ ':OFFICER:' ~ card.token_id %}

{{ officer.last_name if officer and officer.last_name else '' }}{% if officer and officer.last_name and officer.first_name %}, {% endif %}{{ officer.first_name if officer and officer.first_name else (officer.display_name if officer else 'Unknown Officer') }}

Portal Record # {{ officer.id if officer else '' }}
Status: {{ card.status }}
{{ token_value }}
{% endfor %}
